message:
fix(fcp-async-core): propagate RuntimeContext into spawned tasks for nested spawn support

Tasks spawned via task::spawn entered a new Tokio context but did not
push a RuntimeContext onto the thread-local stack, so nested
task::spawn calls inside the spawned task would panic with "called
outside an active runtime".

- Renamed current_runtime_handle() to current_runtime_context() to
  return the full RuntimeContext (handle + flavor), not just the handle
- Made internal RuntimeContext/RuntimeFlavor types pub(crate) so the
  spawn implementation can access them
- Install a RuntimeGuard inside every spawned task so the context is
  inherited, enabling arbitrary spawn nesting depth

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
